def calculate_stats(students):
    if not students:
        print("No data available.")
        return
    scores = list(students.values())
    avg = sum(scores) / len(scores)
    high = max(scores)
    low = min(scores)
    print("\n--- Statistics ---")
    print(f"Average Score: {avg:.2f}")
